meta.title: Dr. Jorge Arce — Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery · v3 Hanza
meta.description: I help patients other surgeons turn away get their function, structure, and confidence back. South Bay, CA.

sections.lede: I help patients other surgeons turn away get their function, structure, and confidence back.

trust.text: Years · Trusted by referring doctors across the South Bay

photo.alt: Dr. Jorge Arce in his clinic
photo.label: clínica vertical 4:5 B/N

sections.title:
From Colombia
to the South Bay.
paras: Dr. Arce trained in Colombia and built his life's work in California, devoting his career entirely to oral and maxillofacial surgery and dental implantology.
Board certified in implantology, he has spent twenty-seven years on the procedures most surgeons refer out — complex extractions, reconstruction, and full-arch implant cases.

In 2007 he founded the Dental Implants Center of South Bay, guided by one conviction: difficult work, done with care, gives people their lives back. Outside the operating room he is a father, a mentor to younger surgeons, and a quiet student of his craft.
facts: Dental Implants Center of South Bay

sections.title:
The work of a career
spent on difficult cases.
sections.lede: Not a list of services — the disciplines refined over nearly three decades.
cells: From single implants to full-arch All-On-X reconstruction, planned and placed with precision.
Rebuilding function and structure where bone and tissue have been lost.
The difficult extractions and surgeries other clinicians prefer to refer elsewhere.
Long-term care that protects the work of a restored smile.
Identifying and addressing conditions affecting teeth, gums, and bone.
Clarity and direction for patients facing complex decisions.

sections.desc: Twenty-seven years of steady hands on the cases with no room for error.

sections.quote: I had been told by two surgeons it was impossible. Dr. Arce took the time no one else did. I can eat, smile, and speak again.
stats: A career devoted entirely to oral and maxillofacial surgery and implantology.
Founder of the Dental Implants Center of South Bay — by referral and by word of mouth.

cells.q: When a case is beyond what I can handle, Jorge is the first call I make. My patients always come back grateful — and so do I.
The most thorough and honest surgeon I have ever met. He treated my father like family.
Calm, precise, and genuinely kind. He explained every step until I understood. The result speaks for itself.
I refer my most complex cases to Dr. Arce without hesitation. Twenty-seven years shows.
I was terrified of the procedure. He never rushed me. Best decision I have made for my health.
Reliable, communicative, and surgically excellent. He sends my patients back with a full report every time.
Years of pain, gone. I only wish I had found him sooner. I recommend Dr. Arce to everyone I know.
The level of care and follow-up is rare. My patients trust him, and that trust reflects back on my practice.
He never rushed me, never talked down to me, and the work is flawless.

posts.d: What full-arch restoration actually involves, who it's for, and what to expect at each stage.

posts.t: How to know if you need an implant
posts.d: The signs worth paying attention to — and why timing often matters more than the procedure itself.
Separating fear from fact, so you can make a calm, informed decision about your health.

sections.title:
Sharing the craft
with the profession.
sections.lead: Beyond the operating room, Dr. Arce lectures and mentors — training the next generation of surgeons and speaking on implantology and complex reconstruction.
rows: When Not to Operate: Judgment in Oral Surgery

invite.p: Available for conferences, study clubs, and resident training on implantology and complex cases.

sections.title:
For the patients told
it couldn't
be done.
sections.sub: From first consultation to final restoration, every case starts with an honest conversation — and a free guide to your first implant visit.
fields: A few words about your situation — or ask for the free guide: What to expect from your first implant consultation.
